name: codex-reporter
description: Create Codex Reporter and let Codex research, publish, and personalize it on schedule.

interface.shortDescription: Your private newspaper, edited daily by Codex
interface.longDescription: Tell Codex what deserves your attention. It creates a private Sites newspaper, publishes a verified first issue, and schedules future issues shaped by explicit Like and Less like this feedback.
defaultPrompt: Show the status of my newspaper.
